description: Gate Metadata sync definition migrated from legacy recipe bundle.

notes: Gate metadata still has optional content tables that need deliberate verification.

tables.name: gate.MetaColumn
tables.predicate: viewId IN (SELECT viewId FROM [gate].[MetaView] WHERE tableId IN ( {id} ))

tables.name: gate.MetaView
tables.predicate: viewId IN (SELECT viewId FROM [gate].[MetaView] WHERE tableId IN ( {id} ))

tables.name: gate.Content
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gate].[MetaView] p WHERE p.viewId = [gate].[Content].viewId AND p.tableId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDataListObjectsTran body.

tables.name: gate.ContentLink
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gate].[Content] p INNER JOIN [gate].[MetaView] _p1 ON _p1.viewId = p.viewId WHERE p.contentId = [gate].[ContentLink].contentId AND _p1.tableId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDataListObjectsTran body.

tables.name: gate.UserGroupPermission
tables.predicate: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [gate].[Content] p INNER JOIN [gate].[MetaView] _p1 ON _p1.viewId = p.viewId WHERE p.contentId = [gate].[UserGroupPermission].contentId AND _p1.tableId = {id})
tables.note: Predicate inferred from FK graph. Verify against core.uspSyncDataListObjectsTran body.

tables.name: gate.jsonSchema
tables.predicate: jsonSchemaId IN (SELECT jsonSchemaId FROM [gate].[MetaColumn] WHERE columnId IN ( (SELECT columnId FROM [gate].[MetaColumn] WHERE viewId IN ( (SELECT viewId FROM [gate].[MetaView] WHERE tableId IN ( {id} )) )) ))

steps.title: Metadata sync
steps.description: Apply transactional metadata changes for the selected gate metadata scope.

steps.title: Pipeline start
steps.description: Start the downstream gate refresh pipeline.
